description: MainActivity.kt is an Android activity implemented in Kotlin that serves as the main UI for a biometric-authenticated demo app. It manages user interactions, UI updates, and observes application state related to authentication, leveraging ViewModel, lifecycle-aware components, and biometric authentication prompts.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: The primary activity managing the demo UI, user interactions, and biometric authentication flow.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, binds Views, starts observation coroutines, and sets up UI interactions.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Handles app resumption, optionally prompting for unlock based on lock state.

methods.name: onDestroy
methods.description: Cancels ongoing coroutines when activity is destroyed.

methods.name: bindViews
methods.description: Associates UI components with their Kotlin references.

methods.name: wireClicks
methods.description: Sets click listeners for buttons to trigger appropriate ViewModel actions.

methods.name: observeAuthState
methods.description: Collects authentication state updates and updates UI accordingly; navigates to HomeActivity when unlocked.

methods.name: observeStatusLog
methods.description: Collects log lines and displays them in the TextView.

methods.name: setButtonsEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables UI buttons based on current auth state.

methods.name: maybePromptUnlock
methods.description: Prompts biometric authentication if available and necessary, to unlock the session.
